DEFT ADD TO CALENDAR TO RECALL BW - FILED

/CAL:SENTENCING/TWS/CH1:ISS:CPROB:PROB 18 M:PJ 1 D/CTS:1/PF145 18/VF2:150/LCHEM/LVAL/DEF:MUST ENROLL IN AND SUCCESSFULLY COMPLETE 1 MADD VICTIM IMPACT PANEL/CTORD: AFTER SUCCESSFUL COMPLETION OF COURT PROBATION, DEFENDANTMAY PETITION THE COURT TO HAVE THE MISDEMEANOR COUNT REDUCED TO AN INFRACTON OR DISMISSED, NUNC PRO TUNC TO TODAY'S DATE,/ /PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/CITE/EMAT/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 100 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/DISM3/4019HALF/X:DUE TO THE CLOSURE OF THE COURT CLERK'S OFFICES, DEFENDANT IS  ORDERED TO CONTACT ALLIANCE ONE BY PHONE (877) 541-8420 OR ONLINE ATWWW,PAYAOI,COM, TO MAKE ARRANGEMENTS TO PAY THE FINES AND FEES IN THIS MATTER, DEFENDANT MUST HAVE SUCH ARRANGEMENTS IN PLACE NOT LATER THAN 01-29-21/CCU/

/CAL:CHANGE OF PLEA/X:THE COURT REVIEWS THE PLEA IN ABSENTIA PAPERWORK WITH DEFENSE COUNSEL,/X:THE MILLS WAIVER IS SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT,//TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:4/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
